title: DYCD — Shared Definitions
description: Reusable JSON Schema definitions shared across NYC Department of Youth and Community Development (DYCD) object schemas. Reconciles fields common to the DYCD Open Data datasets (data.cityofnewyork.us), nyc.gov/site/dycd, and the DYCD Connect / DiscoverDYCD program-finder application (dycdconnect.nyc). Includes the NYC geography spine plus DYCD's own program taxonomy (Program Area / Service Category) and the Neighborhood Development Area (NDA) catchment.

Geography.description: The NYC geography spine shared across DYCD datasets — the join keys back to the rest of city government. Carried on 'DYCD Program Sites' and 'Evaluation and Monitoring Reports'.

nda.description: DYCD Neighborhood Development Area ('NDA') — the community-development catchment.

ProviderReference.description: A reference to the community-based organization (CBO) that DYCD contracts to run a program.

portfolioId.description: DYCD 'PortfolioID' — the provider portfolio key on Program Sites.

ProgramReference.description: A reference to a DYCD program offering by its taxonomy.

programType.description: Program type ('Program Type', e.g. SYEP, COMPASS Elementary, SONYC, Beacon, Cornerstone).
